headline: Moody’s to Host Q&A Session on Generative AI Strategy on June 8, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, June 02, 2026--Moody’s Corporation (NYSE: MCO) will host a Q&A session on June 8, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The session will be moderated by Andrew C. Steinerman, Managing Director and Equity Research Analyst at J.P. Morgan, and will feature Cristina Pieretti, General Manager and Head of Generative AI Solutions.
